enum_values.name: Control
enum_values.summary: Indicates the canvas is currently drawing into the winforms control. This is the most common mode.

enum_values.name: Thumbnail
enum_values.summary: Indicates the canvas is currently drawing itself to a thumbnail image.

enum_values.name: Export
enum_values.summary: Indicates the canvas is currently drawing itself to an off-screen image. This typically happens during Hi-Res export operations.
